notes: Structural drying of Australian industrial/manufacturing sites (warehouse/factory). Metric units, professional technicians in hi-vis and PPE, 230 V / AU equipment. Only real drying gear — axial air movers, desiccant dehumidifiers, lay-flat ducting, polyethylene containment sheeting, humidity monitoring. Bright, clean, professional. No on-image text or brand names.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Introduction to Drying Industrial and Manufacturing Sites'
images.prompt: Wide interior of a large Australian manufacturing warehouse being structurally dried after a flood, several professional restoration technicians in hi-vis workwear and safety boots positioning rows of axial air movers across a polished concrete floor, a large industrial desiccant dehumidifier with lay-flat drying ducting running along racking of palletised stock, bright even daylight from high roof windows, spacious metric-scale interior, clean and orderly. Realistic documentary photography, mid-distance over-shoulder framing.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing/dramatic mould close-ups, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no US power outlets, no standing floodwater, no clutter

images.context: Module on protecting inventory, equipment and covered asset machinery from moisture
images.prompt: A restoration technician in hi-vis and gloves sealing a polyethylene containment barrier of clear plastic sheeting around large industrial machinery in an Australian factory, protecting the covered asset machinery from humidity, neatly taped seams, methodical and orderly, bright clean workshop lighting. Realistic photography, hands-on-task mid-distance framing.

images.context: Module on safeguarding finished-goods warehouses and monitoring humidity during drying
images.prompt: Close mid-distance of a professional technician's gloved hands holding a handheld digital humidity and temperature monitor beside a compact desiccant dehumidifier drying racks of stored raw materials and palletised finished goods in a bright Australian warehouse, protective covers in place, clean climate-controlled environment. Realistic photography, over-shoulder framing on the handheld meter.
